title: RAK2287 LoRaWAN concentrator integration
description: Integrate RAK2287 (Pi HAT with SX1302/SX1250 based concentrator) as a high-capacity border router/gateway for LICHEN. Break into sub-issues for hardware abstraction, packet forwarder compatibility, Rust gateway support, testing, and docs. See LICHEN-plan.md phase 7 and spec/17-border-router.
